message:
Add Cohere and OpenAI Responses API providers with unified routing

New provider implementations:
- src/providers/cohere.rs: Full CohereProvider for v2/chat endpoint with
  streaming support for text, thinking content, and function tool calls
- src/providers/openai_responses.rs: OpenAIResponsesProvider for the newer
  /v1/responses endpoint with streaming response format support

Provider routing changes (src/providers/mod.rs):
- Route "openai" provider to dual-mode handler: "openai-completions" uses
  legacy OpenAIProvider, default uses new OpenAIResponsesProvider
- Route "cohere" to CohereProvider and "cohere-chat" API type
- Add normalize_openai_responses_base() and normalize_cohere_base() for
  endpoint URL normalization
- Strip /responses suffix in normalize_openai_base() to avoid conflicts
- Thread provider name through all provider constructors

Model and auth updates:
- src/models.rs: Add ad-hoc defaults for "cohere" (v2/chat, 128k context)
  and "deepinfra" (openai-completions, 128k context, 16k max tokens)
- src/models.rs: Fix provider config override logic — only apply base_url,
  api, and auth_header from models.json when explicitly set, preserving
  built-in defaults for providers that don't override them
- src/providers/openai.rs: Add provider name field with with_provider_name()
  builder for OpenAI-compatible backends (Groq, Together, etc.)
- src/auth.rs: Add DEEPINFRA_API_KEY and COHERE_API_KEY env key mappings
- README.md: Document new provider environment variables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
